summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NeXifyAI Landing Page v2.0 - All major functionality working correctly after configuration fixes. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend integration working, admin CRM operational.

ui_bugs.issue: FAQ accordion items may not be opening properly when clicked
Mobile menu toggle button not visible on desktop viewport
